package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for ssrf_via_user_controlled_url: `http.Get(userInput)` or `http.NewRequest("GET", userInput, nil)` where the URL comes from request parameters
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario736Positive(r *http.Request) (*http.Response, error) {
	return http.Get(r.FormValue("url"))
}
